init.description: Set up PRODUCT.md, STRATEGY.md, and product memory folders. Run once per product.

ingest.description: Route an interview, meeting, metric, market signal, or note into source + ingestion + hypotheses.

discover.description: Plan a Mom Test-style discovery interview for a learning goal.

shape.description: Turn a problem into a scoped feature brief with hypotheses and metrics.

plan.description: Six-block plan: know, assume, interview, hypothesize, experiment, decide.

prioritize.description: Choose and apply the right prioritization framework for your stage and context.

spec.description: Feature brief to PRD-lite with user stories and acceptance criteria.

prep.description: One-page brief before a stakeholder meeting.

critique.description: Strategy alignment review with P0–P3 findings.

review.description: Weekly maintenance sweep for stale evidence and strategy drift.
